mapper.select: SELECT sid, sname, sgender, smajor, sbirthday, scredit_points FROM students
SELECT sid, sname, sgender, smajor, sbirthday, scredit_points FROM students WHERE sid = #{sid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (sname, sgender, smajor, sbirthday, scredit_points) VALUES (#{sname}, #{sgender}, #{smajor}, #{sbirthday}, #{screditPoints})
